title: Help Betty Eat Without Pain Again! 🐾
hero_text: Help 11-year-old Betty get her smile back and live a pain-free life.
story_text_1: Hi, I'm Betty! I am 11 years old (born in 2015), and 9 years ago, my humans adopted me from an animal shelter to give me a loving home. We live in Offenbach, Germany, and I love my family very much. But right now, we are going through a very difficult and urgent crisis.
story_text_2: Lately, eating has become an unbearable nightmare for me. Every time I approach my food bowl, full of hunger, I am forced to back away immediately because chewing causes me agonizing pain.
story_text_3: My Diagnosis: FORL and Autoimmune Disease. The vet gave us a clear and devastating diagnosis. On top of my pre-existing autoimmune disease, I am suffering from FORL (Feline odontoclastic resorptive lesions). This disease causes severe, extremely painful inflammation of my gums and tooth roots.
story_text_4: My body is already weakened by the autoimmune condition, and this constant dental pain is making everything worse. The veterinarian stated that an immediate surgery to extract all the affected teeth is absolutely necessary to free me from this torment.
story_text_5: Why We Need Your Help: Unfortunately, I do not have pet health insurance. My family is currently facing a severe financial crisis, and they are completely unable to afford the high costs of this urgent FORL surgery on their own. We can immediately provide the official veterinary diagnosis and the cost estimate from the animal clinic to anyone who wishes to verify our story.
story_text_6: We are incredibly grateful for any form of help, donation, or shared link. Every little bit counts to end my daily suffering and help me live a happy, pain-free life again. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your kindness and support! ❤️
